domain.name: personal_assistant
domain.description: General-purpose assistant tasks such as greetings, small talk, and quick help options.

task.name: greeting_response
task.title: Greeting and Quick-Start Options
task.description: Provide a friendly greeting and a few suggested next actions the user can choose from.

schema.name: greeting
schema.description: Structure for a greeting with optional follow-up suggestions.

root_fields.title: Welcome
root_fields.summary: Friendly greeting with a few suggested next actions you can pick from.

fields.text: Hello! How can I help you today?

fields.prompt: Get help with writing or planning

user_facing.title: Hello — how can I help?
user_facing.overview: A quick friendly greeting and a few suggested actions to get started.

sections.title: Quick helpful actions
sections.summary: Common, fast tasks you can ask me to do right away.
bullets: Check the weather or get a forecast.

sections.title: Writing and planning
sections.summary: Help with composing messages or creating simple plans and outlines.
bullets: Create agendas, trip plans, or checklists.

sections.title: Conversation and troubleshooting
sections.summary: General questions, small talk, or troubleshooting steps.
bullets: Ask general knowledge questions or for explanations.

domain.name: personal_assistant
domain.description: General-purpose assistant tasks such as greetings, small talk, and quick help options.

task.name: greeting_response
task.title: Greeting and Quick-Start Options
task.description: Provide a friendly greeting and a few suggested next actions the user can choose from.

task_schema.name: greeting
task_schema.description: Structure for a greeting with optional follow-up suggestions.
task_schema.hierarchy:
Greeting (root)
    |-- Message (leaf)
    `-- Suggestion (container, indexed by @index)
        `-- Action (leaf)
task_schema.syntax_rules:
- Paths start with /Greeting
- Node types: Greeting, Message, Suggestion, Action
- Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]
- Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets

domain_schema.name: root_task_version
domain_schema.description: Global container for tasks with versions
domain_schema.hierarchy:
Root (root)
  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)
      `-- Version (version, indexed by @number)

memory_xml:
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<Root><Greeting_Version number="1"><patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info><conversation_history>hello</conversation_history><Greeting><title>Welcome</title><summary>Friendly greeting with a few suggested next actions you can pick from.</summary><Message><text>Hello! How can I help you today?</text><tone>friendly</tone></Message><Suggestion index="1"><prompt>Common tasks</prompt><Action><text>Ask about the weather</text><actions><action>What's the weather like?</action><action>Weather forecast</action></actions></Action><Action><text>Set a reminder</text><actions><action>Remind me to ...</action><action>Set a timer</action></actions></Action></Suggestion><Suggestion index="2"><prompt>Get help with writing or planning</prompt><Action><text>Draft an email or message</text><actions><action>Write an email to ...</action><action>Compose a short message</action></actions></Action><Action><text>Create a plan or outline</text><actions><action>Make a meeting agenda</action><action>Plan a trip</action></actions></Action></Suggestion></Greeting></Greeting_Version></Root>

display.domain_schema:
name: root_task_version
description: Global container for tasks with versions
hierarchy: "Root (root)\n  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)\n      `-- Version\
  \ (version, indexed by @number)"
nodes:
  Root:
    type: root
    fields: []
    children:
    - Task
  Task:
    type: container
    index_attr: name
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - status
    children:
    - Version
  Version:
    type: version
    index_attr: number
    fields:
    - patch_info
    - conversation_history
    - created_at
    - schema_name
    - data_name
    - summary
    children: []
display.task_schema:
name: greeting
description: Structure for a greeting with optional follow-up suggestions.
hierarchy: "Greeting (root)\n    |-- Message (leaf)\n    `-- Suggestion (container,\
  \ indexed by @index)\n        `-- Action (leaf)"
nodes:
  Greeting:
    type: root
    fields:
    - title
    - summary
    children:
    - Message
    - Suggestion
  Message:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - text
    - tone
    children: []
  Suggestion:
    type: container
    fields:
    - prompt
    children:
    - Action
    index_attr: index
  Action:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - text
    - actions
    children: []
data_files:
  greeting_response: memory/personal_assistant/greeting_response.xml
default_data: greeting_response
examples_file: prompts/query_generator/domains/xpath_examples_greeting.txt
syntax_rules: '- Paths start with /Greeting

  - Node types: Greeting, Message, Suggestion, Action

  - Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]

  - Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets'
display.memory_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<Root>
  <Greeting_Version number="1">
    <patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info>
    <conversation_history>hello</conversation_history>
    <Greeting>
      <title>Welcome</title>
      <summary>Friendly greeting with a few suggested next actions you can pick from.</summary>
      <Message>
        <text>Hello! How can I help you today?</text>
        <tone>friendly</tone>
      </Message>
      <Suggestion index="1">
        <prompt>Common tasks</prompt>
        <Action>
          <text>Ask about the weather</text>
          <actions>
            <action>What's the weather like?</action>
            <action>Weather forecast</action>
          </actions>
        </Action>
        <Action>
          <text>Set a reminder</text>
          <actions>
            <action>Remind me to ...</action>
            <action>Set a timer</action>
          </actions>
        </Action>
      </Suggestion>
      <Suggestion index="2">
        <prompt>Get help with writing or planning</prompt>
        <Action>
          <text>Draft an email or message</text>
          <actions>
            <action>Write an email to ...</action>
            <action>Compose a short message</action>
          </actions>
        </Action>
        <Action>
          <text>Create a plan or outline</text>
          <actions>
            <action>Make a meeting agenda</action>
            <action>Plan a trip</action>
          </actions>
        </Action>
      </Suggestion>
    </Greeting>
  </Greeting_Version>
</Root>
